cdc_analysis.reason: Single clock domain (clk). All modules share the same 50MHz clock. No cross-clock-domain register-to-register paths exist.

rdc_analysis.reason: Single reset domain. rst_n is externally asserted asynchronously, then synchronized through a 2-FF synchronizer (rst_n_meta -> rst_n_sync) before distribution to all internal modules as rst_n_int. No reset domain crossings exist.

notes: Design has single clock domain: clk @ 50MHz
Reset: rst_n (async assert) synchronized via 2-FF synchronizer to rst_n_int
No multi-clock paths, no CDC crossings
No reset domain crossings (single reset, properly synchronized)
Scan chain is loopback (test_so=test_si) - no DFT CDC concerns
